metadata.title: Smart Food AI | Chorn Planet
metadata.description: Smart Food AI by ChornPlanet presents an AI-native food service workflow for menu discovery, ordering support, operations coordination, and local business growth.

hero.title: Smart Food AI
hero.lead: Smart Food AI connects menu information, customer conversation, order coordination, and business operations into one practical AI-native service experience.
hero.support: Designed from real local-business workflow in Chiang Mai, the page presents ChornPlanet's capability to turn food-service operations into a clear, scalable digital platform.

visual.alt: Smart Food AI platform serving customers in Chiang Mai

heading.title: Built for real food-service operations
heading.text: Smart Food AI presents a clear product direction for AI-native food-service operations, customer communication, and business workflow support.

paragraphs: Smart Food AI supports restaurant and food-service teams that need accurate menu communication, order readiness, payment confirmation, and operational follow-up.
The platform direction focuses on practical customer experience first: helping people understand menus, choose items, confirm orders, and move smoothly toward fulfillment.

image.alt: Smart Food AI serving customers in Chiang Mai through chat food ordering

cards.title: Customer conversation
cards.text: Support customers with menu discovery, item clarification, ordering guidance, and friendly service communication.

cards.title: Operational coordination
cards.text: Help connect customer requests with store operations, finance confirmation, and preparation flow.

cards.title: Platform readiness
cards.text: Show how ChornPlanet can transform a real business workflow into a premium AI-native product surface.

heading.title: From customer request to service action
heading.text: A simple end-to-end view of how Smart Food AI supports food-service operations.

steps.title: AI Chat Ordering
steps.text: Customers can order through AI-assisted chat by selecting a menu item, asking questions, or confirming an order through a simple conversation.

image.alt: AI chat ordering interface for Smart Food customers

steps.title: Bill Processing
steps.text: The system confirms the order total, receives payment information or a payment slip, and checks the bill before moving the order to the next step.

image.alt: Smart Food bill processing and payment verification

steps.title: Cooking
steps.text: The kitchen team prepares the confirmed order using fresh ingredients, a clear workflow, and consistent food quality standards.

image.alt: Kitchen team preparing a confirmed Smart Food order

steps.title: Delivery
steps.text: The rider picks up the completed order and delivers it to the customer according to the Smart Food service workflow.

image.alt: Smart Food delivery workflow with rider handoff

steps.title: Receiving
steps.text: The customer receives the food through a clear handover process, completing the service journey from ordering to receiving the meal.

image.alt: Customer receiving a completed Smart Food order

heading.title: Practical AI support for food-service growth

items: Clear customer response flow for menu, price, and service questions
Operational handoff between customer service, finance, and preparation teams
Content-ready structure for multilingual and database-backed publishing
Premium ChornPlanet presentation for partners, investors, and future customers

heading.title: A real AI-native product surface, not only a concept page
heading.text: Smart Food AI helps ChornPlanet demonstrate practical platform capability through a workflow that local businesses can understand and use.

cards.title: Better customer clarity
cards.text: Customers receive clearer information about menu choices, prices, and ordering next steps.

cards.title: Better team coordination
cards.text: Teams can align customer service, finance confirmation, and order processing around a more structured workflow.

cards.title: Better platform positioning
cards.text: The page communicates ChornPlanet as an AI-native production platform with real commercial direction.

futureDirections: Continue expanding localized Smart Food AI content for partners, customers, and future product stories.
Continue improving Smart Food AI as a production-ready food-service platform surface.
Preserve safe public wording without exposing internal technical architecture.
